productName: Infused Bubble Hash Little Snappers - Orange Truffle - 2pk (2x0.5g)
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Orange Truffle and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a sweet, juicy orange flavor, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
